title: Minimum Number of Days to Eat N Oranges
hints: Notice that eating one orange repeatedly is too slow; focus on the division operations to reduce n quickly.
Use memoization or a map to store results for subproblems, since many paths converge to the same n values.
From n, the optimal next step is usually n-1 then n/2, or n-2 then n*2/3; recurse on these reduced states.
